name: Vapi | SAH Kitchen | Get Order Tool

parameters.pythonCode:
import re
import json

order = items[0]["json"]

def clean(text):
    if not text:
        return ""
    text = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', str(text))
    text = re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9 .,:%()/-]', '', text)
    text = text.replace("\n", " ").replace("\r", " ")
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

order_id = clean(order.get("id", ""))
status = clean(order.get("status", ""))
total = clean(order.get("total", ""))
currency = clean(order.get("currency", ""))
date_created = clean(order.get("date_created", ""))

# Get customer info if exists
billing = order.get("billing", {})
shipping = order.get("shipping", {})
customer_name = clean(f"{shipping.get('first_name', '')} {shipping.get('last_name', '')}")
customer_email = clean(billing.get("email", ""))
customer_phone = clean(billing.get("phone", ""))
customer_shipping_address = clean(f"{shipping.get('address_1', '')} {shipping.get('address_2', '')}, {shipping.get('city', '')} {shipping.get('state', '')} {shipping.get('country', '')} {shipping.get('postalcode', '')}")

# Get first ordered product name if exists
first_product = ""
if "line_items" in order and len(order["line_items"]) > 0:
    first_product = clean(order["line_items"][0].get("name", ""))

message = (
    f"Order ID is {order_id}, "
    f"Status is {status}, "
    f"Total is {total} {currency}, "
    f"Order date is {date_created}, "
    f"Customer name is {customer_name}, "
    f"Email is {customer_email}, "
    f"Phone is {customer_phone}, "
    f"Shipping Address is {customer_shipping_address}, "
    f"First product ordered is {first_product}."
)

message_json_safe = json.dumps(message)[1:-1]

return [{"json": {"message": message_json_safe}}]
